title: clibadium surinamense var. asperum
intro: Clibadium surinamense var. asperum, also known as asperous Surinam shield, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Clibadium surinamense var. asperum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Clibadium surinamense var. asperum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
